titles.text: Shimura Ken no Bakatono-sama: Bakushou Tenka Touitsu Game

descriptions.text: Shimura Ken no Bakatono-sama: Bakushou Tenka Touitsu Game is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Kamui and published by TDK Core, which was released in Japan in 2002.
Build a castle on a vacant lot and collect tolls from players who land on that square.
